flashcards.definition: A = P(1 + r/n)^(nt); P = principal, r = rate, n = compoundings, t = years.
FV = P·[(1+r)ⁿ − 1]/r; sum of a geometric series of payments.
A = P(1 + rt); grows linearly (arithmetic sequence).
Time for a quantity to double; T = ln2/r for continuous growth.
PV = FV/(1+r)ⁿ; the current worth of a future amount.
